name: Marinated Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lb Top, eye or bottom round beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak a clay pot in cold water for 10 minutes.
2. Tie the beef with string in four places to retain its shape during cooking.
3. In the clay pot, combine all marinade ingredients: red wine, vegetable oil, Worcestershire or soy sauce, finely chopped onion, garlic, carrots, celery, parsley sprigs, thyme, bay leaf, and peppercorns.
4. Marinate the beef for at least 24 hours, turning it several times to ensure even coating.
5. Add sufficient water or beef broth to the marinade so that 3/4 of the height is covered by liquid.
6. Place the pot in a cold oven.
7. Adjust the heat to 450 degrees F and bake for 1 1/2 hours.
8. Serve with horseradish.
